title: Adding a Company Logo

posts.author: Alastair_Foggo (Alastair Foggo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi. I’m trying to customise a dashboard for our senior team to view and would like to put our company logo on it. Can this be done and, if so, how? This is NOT for a forms view.

Also, is there a way to have the background on boards and dashboards in corporate colours?

Looking for ward to your feedback.

Thanks.
